feature_buckets.Efficiency: College EPA/PPA production and efficiency signals.
feature_buckets.Passing: Passing volume, accuracy, depth and pressure-related traits.
feature_buckets.Rushing: Rushing volume, efficiency, explosive production and touchdowns.
feature_buckets.Blocking: Offensive line pass-blocking and run-blocking traits.
feature_buckets.Coverage: Defensive coverage production and grading signals.
feature_buckets.Pass Rush: Pressure, sack and pass-rush production traits.
